  "title": "Full-Stack Web Developer & Graphic Designer",
  "description": "Ossaj Services is a leading technical service company dedicated to delivering innovative engineering design solutions. We support projects across various industries by providing reliable, efficient, and high?quality technical expertise tailored to meet our clients&rsquo; needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full-Stack Web Developer &amp; Graphic Designer
Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	As a Full-Stack Web Developer &amp; Graphic Designer, you will play a dual role, blending technicalexpertisein web development with creativeproficiencyin graphic design.
	You will work closely with our team to develop andmaintainuser-friendly web applications while also creating visually appealing graphic designs that enhance userexperienceand align with our brand identity.


Key Responsibilities
Full-Stack Web Development:


	Design, develop, andmaintainresponsive, user-centric websites and web applications.
	Write clean, scalable, and well-documented code using languages such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and backend frameworks (e.g., Node.js, Python, PHP).
	Build and integrate APIs, databases, and server-side applications.
	Troubleshoot and debug tooptimizeperformance and fix bugs.
	Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.
	Collaborate with stakeholders to gather and translate requirements into functional features.


Graphic Design:


	Create compelling visual assets, including web layouts, UI elements, logos, banners, and marketing materials.
	Develop cohesive branding materials and guidelines.
	Use tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD) or Figma to design engaging visuals.
	Collaborate with the marketing and development teams to ensure designs align with the overall strategy.
	Conduct user research and apply feedback to enhance design effectiveness.


Requirements
Preferred Qualifications:


	Bachelor&#39;s or HND in Computer Science, Software Engineering,Graphic Design or a related field
	Experience with CMS platforms like WordPress, Shopify, or Webflow.
	Familiarity with motion graphics and video editing tools.
	Basic understanding of SEO and digital marketing principles.
	Previousexperience in a similar dual role.
	Ability to work Monday to Friday from10am&ndash;7pm WAT.


Technical Skills:


	Certified and proficient in front-end technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (and frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js).
	Experience with backend development using languages such as Node.js, Python,Java, or PHP.
	Certification andknowledge of database systems (e.g., MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL).
	Cloud certification (e.g., AWS Certified Developer, Azure Fundamentals)
	Agile and Scrum certifications (e.g., Certified ScrumMaster)
	Familiarity with version control systems like Git.
	Experience with web hosting platforms and deployment tools.


Design Skills:


	Proficient in graphic design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, XD) or Figma.
	Strong portfolioshowcasingweb and graphic design projects.
	Understanding oftypography, color theory, and design principles.
	Knowledge of UX/UI design methodologies.


Soft Skills:


	Strong communicationand collaboration skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
	Creative thinker with problem-solving capabilities.
	Attention to detail and a passion for high-quality work.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Flexible work hours and remote work options.
	Opportunity to work on exciting projects in a collaborative environment.
	Professional growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;

  "description": "Welcome to Teestone Hotel &amp; Apartments, a modern boutique hotel located in the peaceful neighborhood of Ikeja and only 15 minutes from Muritala Muhammed International Airport. For travelers searching for hotels in Ikeja, Teestone offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and contemporary hospitality. Whether you are visiting Lagos for business, attending meetings in Ikeja, catching an early flight, or simply planning a relaxing staycation, our hotel provides a stylish and welcoming environment designed to make your stay memorable.

Unlike many traditional hotels near Lagos airport, Teestone Hotel &amp; Apartments provides guests with a quieter and more relaxing setting away from the heavy airport traffic while still maintaining quick and easy access to the airport and major commercial areas of Ikeja. Our thoughtfully designed rooms, rooftop bar, suspended swimming pool, and personalized guest experience make Teestone one of the most comfortable places to stay for visitors looking for quality accommodation in Ikeja.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Front Desk Personnel

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Front Office
Reports To: Front Office Manager / Hotel Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a professional and customer-focused Hotel Receptionist to serve as the first point of contact for our guests.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for welcoming guests, managing reservations, handling check-ins and check-outs, answering inquiries, and ensuring an excellent guest experience throughout their stay.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome guests in a friendly and professional manner.
	Manage guest check-in and check-out procedures efficiently.
	Handle room reservations, cancellations, and modifications.
	Answer telephone calls, emails, and guest inquiries promptly.
	Provide information about hotel services, facilities, and local attractions.
	Process payments and maintain accurate billing records.
	Respond to guest requests and resolve complaints professionally.
	Coordinate with housekeeping, maintenance, and other departments to ensure guest satisfaction.
	Maintain accurate guest records and reservation information.
	Ensure the reception area remains clean, organized, and presentable.
	Follow hotel policies, procedures, and security standards.


Requirements


	Previous experience as a receptionist, front desk officer, or customer service representative is preferred.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and customer service skills.
	Basic computer proficiency and familiarity with reservation systems.
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Ability to remain calm and professional under pressure.
	Flexible to work shifts, weekends, and public holidays.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: teestonejobs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "description": "Ossaj Services is a leading technical service company dedicated to delivering innovative engineering design solutions. We support projects across various industries by providing reliable, efficient, and high?quality technical expertise tailored to meet our clients&rsquo; needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Lead

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Digital Marketing Lead is responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing OSSAJ&rsquo;s digital demand generation ecosystem.
	This role owns the complete digital customer journey from first website interaction through lead qualification, nurturing, conversion, and customer acquisition.
	The position also leads recruitment marketing initiatives to attract high-quality talent across OSSAJ companies.


Responsibilities
Digital Experience &amp; Website Optimization:


	Work with web developers to optimize websites, landing pages, and digital experiences to maximize lead generation and conversion rates.
	Implement visitor personalization strategies.
	Enhance first-touch data capture and progressive profiling.
	Conduct ongoing UX, CRO, SEO, and website assessments.
	Optimize forms, chat experiences, landing pages, and conversion paths.


Lead Intelligence &amp; Qualification:


	Develop lead scoring and propensity-to-convert models.
	Automate lead qualification workflows using CRM and AI.
	Implement real-time lead routing and response systems.
	Create audience segmentation and nurture programs.


Marketing Automation &amp; Revenue Operations:


	Build and maintain automated lead nurturing journeys.
	Integrate CRM, website, advertising, email, and reporting platforms.
	Improve sales and marketing alignment through automation.
	Monitor qualification rates, response times, and conversion performance.


Pipeline &amp; Demand Generation:


	Maintain a healthy pipeline of qualified opportunities.
	Execute multi-channel demand generation campaigns.
	Manage paid search, paid social, display, email, and retargeting campaigns.
	Support customer acquisition goals while maintaining target acquisition costs.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Report paid media performance including spend, CTR, CPC, CPL, CVR, and ROAS.
	Analyze website traffic, funnel performance, and landing page effectiveness.
	Provide end-to-end attribution from traffic source to closed customer.
	Develop executive dashboards and KPI reporting.


MarTech Strategy:


	Implement and optimize a Martech stack covering Data, Decisioning, Design, and Distribution/Measurement.
	Evaluate AI and automation technologies.
	Maintain data quality, governance, and attribution accuracy.


Talent Attraction &amp; Recruitment Marketing:


	Use social media marketing to recruit employees across OSSAJ companies.
	Manage recruitment campaigns across LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and other channels.
	Create employer branding and recruitment content.
	Track cost per applicant, cost per hire, and recruitment funnel metrics.
	Develop talent pipelines for field, technical, engineering, project management, and administrative positions.


Key Performance Indicators


	Website conversion rate
	Marketing-qualified leads (MQLs)
	Sales-qualified leads (SQLs)
	Cost per acquisition (CPA)
	Return on advertising spend (ROAS)
	Lead response time
	Qualified applicants generated
	Cost per applicant
	Cost per hire
	Time-to-fill open positions


Requirements
Preferred Qualifications:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Digital Marketing, Business Analytics, Communications, Computer Science, or related field
	5+ years of experience in digital marketing, demand generation, marketing operations, or growth marketing
	Experience implementing marketing technology stacks and automation systems
	Experience improving website conversion rates and marketing ROI
	Experience with B2B construction, facility services, manufacturing, or industrial organizations
	Ability to work Monday to Friday from 10am &ndash; 7pm WAT.


Technical Skills:


	HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or equivalent CRM platforms
	Marketing automation platforms
	Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking
	Paid media campaign management
	SEO, CRO, and website analytics
	Lead scoring and qualification systems
	Power BI, Looker Studio, Excel, or equivalent reporting tools
	AI-driven marketing and automation tools


Method of Application&nbsp;
